title: MC NEW ADVENTURE
description: A survival-focused adventure modpack filled with exploration, mystery, and new challenges across every biome.
body:
**⚠️ Disclaimer:
 To experience the modpack with all quests and full content, make sure to manually download the required additional mods.
Without them, some quests may not appear or function correctly.
The download links are listed below.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

FTB QUESTS: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge
FTB XCOMPACT: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat
FTBLIBRARY: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge
BIOMES-O-PLENTY: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty

</details>

🌍 MC: NEW ADVENTURE

“A familiar world… reborn with danger, mystery, and discovery.”

🧭 About

Minecraft New Adventure transforms your world into a true survival experience —
a place where exploration, danger, and discovery blend together.
Every biome hides new secrets, ancient ruins, fierce enemies, and powerful relics that shape your story.

Whether you build, fight, or explore, this modpack ensures every moment feels meaningful.

⚒ Main Features

🏕 Revamped Exploration: Dozens of new structures, villages, and dungeons to uncover.

⚔️ Challenging Encounters: Unique bosses and hostile mobs guarding rare treasures.

💎 Expanded Gear & Progression: Craft Emerald, Amethyst, and Ruby tools stronger than Netherite.

🧩 Quest Chapters: Experience immersive questlines that guide you through the world’s mysteries —
(chapters are still being expanded in future updates).

🌌 Endgame Mystery: Seek hidden relics scattered across the world to unlock the ultimate challenge.

🔧 Performance & Compatibility

Optimized for smooth performance using lightweight and essential mods like:

Rubidium / Sodium Equivalent

JEI (for recipes)

Traveler’s Backpack

Create Mod Enhancements

⚡ No shaders required — great visuals and smooth performance out of the box.

💬 Notes

**This is the complete base version of MCNew Adventure —
fully playable, stable, and feature-rich.
Only the quest chapters will continue to expand over time with new stories, bosses, and lore updates.**

 **Mods Attribution**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

mojang logo mod link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mojang-logo-animation
